message:
test(differential): add 15 DEC Special Graphics charset fixtures (bd-2wquq)

Add differential harness entries for charset support: G0 designation,
G1 with SO/SI, box-drawing characters, reset behaviors, passthrough,
SS2/SS3 single shifts, and DEC graphics with attributes. Grows
differential fixture count from 98 to 113.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
